# ctyun_iam_user_ak (Resource)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10345725/10355289



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

# 可参考index.md，在环境变量中配置ak、sk、资源池ID、可用区名称
provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}

resource "ctyun_iam_user_ak" "ak_test" {
  user_id = "c2c8827c8ca4433a97e8e133a41c33b9"
  enabled = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user_id` (String) 用户ID

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) 密钥状态

### Read-Only

- `ak` (String) 用户AK
- `create_time` (String) 创建时间，为UTC格式
- `id` (String) ID
- `sk` (String) 用户SK
